summary: This EEG dataset carries a HIGH de-anonymization risk (score 67/100). The highest-risk inference task is 'Subject Re-Identification' with AUC=0.980.

tasks.name: Cognitive State
tasks.implication: Mental intentions are readable — even 'monitoring' apps reveal what you're thinking.

tasks.name: Subject Re-Identification
tasks.implication: Anonymized EEG can be matched back to specific individuals — brainprints are unique.

tasks.name: Medical Marker
tasks.implication: EEG from any app may reveal epilepsy, ADHD, or other conditions users never disclosed.

tasks.name: Attention/Cognitive Load
tasks.implication: Advertisers and employers would pay for continuous attention monitoring from your EEG.
